column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a beautiful wagasa (traditional umbrella)" | TEXT="雨ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the rain gently" | TEXT="しとしと…" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling under the umbrella" | TEXT="風情がありますね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding out a hand to catch rain drops" | TEXT="冷たい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking a bit sad the rain continues" | TEXT="やまないかな" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking relived as rain stops" | TEXT="やみました！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Closing the wagasa elegantly" | TEXT="よかった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a beautiful rainbow" | TEXT="虹！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to the sky with a smile" | TEXT="綺麗"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking closely at a wet flower" | TEXT="しっとり" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting umbrella to look up" | TEXT="あっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Offering the umbrella to someone" | TEXT="入りませんか" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sharing an umbrella fondly" | TEXT="相合い傘" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing slightly under the umbrella" | TEXT="近いですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking away shyly" | TEXT="えっと…" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing lightly" | TEXT="ふふふ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding onto a sleeve gently" | TEXT="離れないでね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking deeply into eyes" | TEXT="好き"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sneezing elegantly" | TEXT="くしゅん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing shoulders cold" | TEXT="少し寒い" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Wrapping a shawl warmly" | TEXT="あたたかい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking worried" | TEXT="風邪ひかないでね" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Patting back comfortingly" | TEXT="大丈夫？" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding confidently" | TEXT="任せて" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="バッチリ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Thumbs up with a wink" | TEXT="いいね！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands once" | TEXT="よし！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing looking at the rainy window" | TEXT="退屈だなぁ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="お出かけできない" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking excited suddenly" | TEXT="そうだ！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Bringing out tea and wagashi" | TEXT="お茶にしましょう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Reading a book gracefully by the window" | TEXT="読書日和" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping leaning on the table" | TEXT="うとうと" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up blushing" | TEXT="寝てた！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out playfully" | TEXT="てへぺろ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving hand dismissively" | TEXT="気にしないで"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking angry gracefully" | TEXT="ぷんぷん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Turning away" | TEXT="知らない" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back teary-eyed" | TEXT="本当に？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tear softly" | TEXT="よかった" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Hugging warmly" | TEXT="ぎゅっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling peacefully" | TEXT="安心した" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding both hands together" | TEXT="これお願い" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="ありがとう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye with wagasa" | TEXT="また明日ね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully on wet pavement" | TEXT="足元気を付けて" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping and turning around" | TEXT="どうしたの？" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking excited, pointing at something down" | TEXT="カエル！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking scared, stepping back" | TEXT="ひゃっ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing at herself" | TEXT="びっくりした" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Breathing deeply" | TEXT="深呼吸" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking determined" | TEXT="がんばるぞ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Raising fist softly" | TEXT="オー！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling warmly at camera" | TEXT="お疲れ様"
